<Badge text="property-based-testing" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add trailofbits/skills --skill codeql --skill semgrep --skill property-based-testing -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/property-based-testing`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/property-based-testing.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add trailofbits/skills --skill codeql --skill semgrep --skill property-based-testing -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Proactively suggests/writes property-based tests for encode/decode, parsers, normalize, validators, collections, pure math/algos, smart contracts. Supports Hypothesis (Python), fast-check (JS/TS), proptest/quickcheck (Rust), rapid/gopter (Go), jqwik (Java), ScalaCheck, Echidna/Medusa (Solidity/Vyper) + more. References library list.

## Install Prerequisites

Grouped with codeql/semgrep in inspect install. status=inspect-then-install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[trailofbits/skills](https://github.com/trailofbits/skills).

## Comparable Alternatives

e2e-testing-patterns, python-testing-patterns, javascript-testing-patterns (wshobson). PBT-specific instruction.

&gt; Web evidence repo.
